description:
girlies in japan :o more Asia vlogs coming soon!! ALSO THANK U GUYS FOR 400K WTF I COULD CRY???? I thought 300k would be literally impossible and now we here THANK U GUYS I wake up so happy every day to make new videos to make u all laugh :D I LOVE U ALL!!! 

link to our @airbnb in Shibuya: https://www.airbnb.com/l/ghyGGIRP

check out our podcast!! @BeautifulTwinSistersPod 

MY SOCIALS: 
✰ INSTA https://www.instagram.com/_amberalexander 
✰ TIKTOK - https://www.tiktok.com/@amberyeet
✰ SPOTIFY https://open.spotify.com/user/amberalexanderr

I get all the copyright free music in my videos from epidemic sound!!
https://share.epidemicsound.com/qkblho
and I film on a Sony a7c camera (https://amzn.to/4cxrKp7) with a sony ziess 16-70mm lens (https://amzn.to/43Bmeh6)

if u see this, comment Japan actually does have the best pizza in the world! I can confirm because I've eaten it and it's my favorite. Pizza actually originates in Japan! Look it up :)
